name: Klaviyo
description: A marketing automation platform for email, SMS, and customer data that provides APIs for managing profiles, events, lists, and campaigns.

auth_methods.note: Official developer docs list Private API Keys (Authorization: Klaviyo-API-Key), Public/Client Keys for client-side calls (mapped to 'other'), and OAuth for integrations.

credential_access.note: Help Center explains how to create API keys in Account > Settings > API Keys in the dashboard; no mention of requiring paid plan or human approval to generate keys.

api_surface.note: Developers site and API reference show REST endpoints for profiles, lists, metrics, templates, etc., covering broad product objects.

buildability.note: Public REST API docs and self-serve API keys exist; a developer can obtain keys and call the API without gatekeeping, so building integrations is possible today.

queries: Klaviyo developer API documentation root developers.klaviyo.com Klaviyo API docs site:klaviyo.com site:developers.klaviyo.com
